text: close to T-83, could be done together

Audit findings:
1. list -l doesn't support comma-separated labels (new -l and update -l do via parse_labels)
2. claim outputs full issue line, all other mutating commands output just the ID
3. close and reject have no --actor flag (note has one)
4. close and reject only accept one ticket ID (claim accepts multiple)
5. show has no -f/--format flag (always JSON)
6. summary has no -f/--format flag (always text)
